message:
fix: Include .pem in site-packages (certifi), remove all test skips/excludes

- Add .pem to INCLUDE_EXTENSIONS so certifi/cacert.pem is bundled (fixes
  requests import: FileNotFoundError on cacert.pem)
- Remove all vitest excludes — every test file runs in CI
- Revert describe.skip on numpy tests — failures are honest signal

files.patch:
@@ -6,12 +6,6 @@ export default defineConfig({
     globalSetup: "./test/setup.ts",
     fileParallelism: false,
     exclude: [
-      "test/pydantic.test.ts",
-      "test/langchain.test.ts",
-      "test/langgraph.test.ts",
-      "test/ai-libs.test.ts",
-      "test/numpy.test.ts",
-      "test/pillow.test.ts",
       "**/node_modules/**",
     ],
   },
